title.en: Video conferencing and Internet Protocol telephony

group-parts.group: Video conferencing and Internet Protocol telephony
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en:
# Internet Protocol telephony

This section describes the controls applicable to Internet Protocol (IP) telephony and extends upon the ‘Telephone systems’ section of these guidelines.

# Video conferencing and Internet Protocol telephony gateways

Where a video conferencing or IP telephony network is connected to another network from a different security domain, the ‘Gateways’ section of the [Guidelines for gateways](#e8bde527-526c-4a6a-b66f-05228f09dd7b) applies.

# Further information

Further information on gateways can be found in the ‘Gateways’ section of the [Guidelines for gateways](#e8bde527-526c-4a6a-b66f-05228f09dd7b).

Further information on firewalls can be found in the ‘Firewalls’ section of the [Guidelines for gateways](#e8bde527-526c-4a6a-b66f-05228f09dd7b).

Further information on the use of web conferencing solutions can be found in ASD’s [Web conferencing security](#e19a0c40-0a68-4fba-aea1-142fdd57dc75) publication.
